text.title: seo-for-spas Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for seo-for-spas as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Fetching product data in useEffect and rendering into DOM after hydration.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: The initial HTML contains no product content — crawlers may index an empty shell.

failure-mode.description: A single static title and description shared across all pages of a SPA.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Every page gets the same snippet in search results; click-through rate drops and duplicate content is flagged.

failure-mode.description: Breadcrumb schema that diverges from the visible breadcrumb navigation.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Google validates schema against rendered content; mismatches can result in a manual action or rich result loss.
